chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 778 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عَنْ فَأْرَةِ اَلْمِسْكِ تَكُونُ مَعَ مَنْ يُصَلِّي وَ هِيَ فِي جَيْبِهِ أَوْ ثِيَابِهِ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِذَلِكَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.778 - He (Ali ibn Ja’far ) asked Him, Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as), about a musk pouch being with someone while they are praying, either in their pocket or clothing.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in that."
